ModMetaData.name: RimSynapse - Psychology
ModMetaData.author: RimSynapse Team
ModMetaData.description:
[h1]RimSynapse - Psychology[/h1] [b]True AI-Driven Personalities and Dynamic Mental States.[/b]
RimSynapse Psychology leverages the power of Local LLMs to completely overhaul how pawns think, feel, and react. Colonists are no longer just a collection of static traits; they are living, breathing entities with deep backstories, evolving psychological profiles, and unique interpretations of every event on the Rim.
[h2]Features[/h2] [list] [*] [b]Dynamic Psychological Profiles:[/b] Each pawn maintains a living "Journal" and a "Psychological Profile" that updates nightly based on their experiences. [*] [b]LLM-Interpreted Memories:[/b] A simple "-3 Ate without table" is transformed by the AI into a nuanced memory, shaping their worldview based on their existing traits and background. [*] [b]Extreme Mental States:[/b] Introduces horrifyingly realistic breaks like "Suicidal (Burn)", "Suicidal (Starvation)", and euphoric "Reckless" behaviors. These are rare, trait-driven, and highly impactful. [*] [b]Functional Depression:[/b] Pawns experiencing extreme despair may still go to work and sleep, but completely refuse to eat, requiring immediate intervention before they fade away. [*] [b]The "Snap Out Of It" Mechanic:[/b] Driven by the pawn's traits, survival instinct can override extreme mental states if they sustain too much pain or malnutrition—creating dramatic, emergent stories of survival. [*] [b]Interactive UI:[/b] Open the new Psychology tab to read their inner thoughts, analyze their mental trajectory, and see exactly how they view their fellow colonists. [/list]
[h2]Requirements[/h2] [list] [*] [b]Harmony[/b] [*] [b]RimSynapse Core[/b] (Must be loaded before this mod) [*] A running local LLM backend via LM Studio or Ollama. [/list]
[h2]Support the Project[/h2] If you enjoy the psychological depth this mod brings to RimWorld, consider buying me a coffee! [url=https://buymeacoffee.com/archdukejim]☕ Buy me a coffee[/url]
